shift_reminder.subject: Recordatorio: Turno de voluntariado mañana — {{title}} — {{community}}
shift_reminder.title: Recordatorio de Turno
shift_reminder.preview: Su turno de voluntariado para {{title}} se acerca
shift_reminder.body: Este es un recordatorio amistoso sobre su próximo turno de voluntariado.

shift_starting_soon.subject: Su turno de voluntariado comienza pronto — {{title}}
shift_starting_soon.title: El Turno Comienza Pronto
shift_starting_soon.preview: Su turno de voluntariado para {{title}} comienza pronto
shift_starting_soon.body: Su turno de voluntariado está a punto de comenzar. ¡Gracias por su compromiso con la comunidad!

post_shift_feedback.subject: Gracias por su voluntariado — {{title}}
post_shift_feedback.title: ¡Gracias por Su Voluntariado!
post_shift_feedback.preview: Gracias por su turno de voluntariado con {{title}}
post_shift_feedback.body: Gracias por completar su turno de voluntariado con {{title}}. ¡Su contribución marca una diferencia real!
post_shift_feedback.log_hours_prompt: Por favor, recuerde registrar sus horas para que su contribución quede documentada.

lapsed_volunteer.subject: We miss seeing you volunteer
lapsed_volunteer.title: Ready for another volunteer shift?
lapsed_volunteer.preview: There are new volunteering opportunities waiting for you
lapsed_volunteer.body: It has been a while since your last recorded volunteer shift. If you are available again, your community would be glad to have your help.

credential_expiry.subject: Your volunteer credential expires soon
credential_expiry.title: Credential Expiring Soon
credential_expiry.preview: A verified volunteer credential is nearing its expiry date
credential_expiry.body: One of your verified volunteer credentials is nearing its expiry date. Please update it so organisers can continue assigning you to suitable opportunities.

training_expiry.subject: Your volunteer training expires soon
training_expiry.title: Training Expiring Soon
training_expiry.preview: A verified volunteer training record is nearing its expiry date
training_expiry.body: One of your verified volunteer training records is nearing its expiry date. Please update it so organisers can continue assigning you to suitable opportunities.
